fields_changed.what: Cross-app AI on Microsoft Graph + 400+ MCP connectors; Work IQ persistent context layer now also exposed via Work IQ APIs (GA Jun 16, 2026) with Chat/Context/Tools domains, letting third parties build on the same grounding intelligence; cross-session memory, Copilot Notebooks.
fields_changed.notes: Work IQ APIs reach GA 2026-06-16; consumption-priced in Copilot Credits.

change_summary: Work IQ opened as APIs (GA Jun 16 2026) - the context layer becomes a programmable platform third parties build agents on.
